svg.title: Autopilot - The False Confidence
svg.desc: The apprentice (you) stands on a pedestal, eyes closed in blissful autopilot, arms up conducting like an orchestra maestro. Three identical brooms march past in formation, each with arms carrying buckets and their bundle bristles forked into walking legs. The brooms look imposing in their uniformity - they just keep multiplying exactly the same. Sparkles drift lazily as you've stopped paying attention. The scene captures that dangerous moment of false confidence when everything seems to be working on its own and you drift into mindless approval mode.
